question_text: Let p and q be any two propositions. Consider the following propositional statements. S1 : p →q, S2 : ¬p ∧q, S3 : ¬p ∨q, S4 : ¬p ∨¬q, where ∧denotes conjunction (AND operation), ∨denotes disjunction (OR operation),

options.A: nd ¬ denotes negation (NOT operation). Which one of the following options is correct? (Note: ≡denotes logical equivalence)
